Module com.example.cincuentazo
Package com.example.cincuentazo.view

Class ViewManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
public final class ViewManager extends Object
Centralized manager responsible for loading FXML views and swapping scenes on the primary stage.

This class is the single point of contact with the JavaFX Stage. No controller, model or other view ever touches the stage directly; instead, they request screen changes through this manager. This keeps the navigation logic in one place and guarantees that the stage is always loaded and displayed consistently.

The class follows the Singleton pattern: a single shared instance coordinates all view transitions throughout the application's lifetime.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static ViewManager getInstance()
      Returns the single shared instance of the view manager.
      Returns:
      the shared ViewManager instance

    • initialize

      public void initialize(javafx.stage.Stage stage)
      Stores the primary stage and applies the base window configuration. Must be called once, from the application's start method, before requesting any view.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary stage provided by JavaFX

    • showStartView

      public void showStartView()
      Loads and displays the start view, where the player selects how many machine opponents to play against.

    • showGameView

      public void showGameView(int machineOpponents)
      Loads and displays the game view, passing the chosen number of machine opponents to its controller.
      Parameters:
      machineOpponents - the number of machine opponents (1, 2 or 3)

    • swapScene

      private void swapScene(String fxmlPath)
      Loads the FXML located at the given classpath path and sets it as the current scene on the primary stage.

      This method performs a robust lookup of the FXML resource and fails fast with a descriptive message if the file cannot be found, which makes configuration problems easy to diagnose.

      Parameters:
      fxmlPath - the absolute classpath path of the FXML to load
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the FXML resource cannot be located or loaded
